$description: Spacing scale (figma-parity-reconciliation ADR; research F1: spacing already MATCHES the Figma binding - 4-base 2,4,6,8,12,16,24,32). This source brings the existing scale under the generated non-color token pipeline so spacing parity is mechanical rather than hand-policed; the values are unchanged from the prior --spacing-vs-* tokens. The rem-px basis is 16px. Emits as --spacing-fg-* CSS custom properties via the pipeline; the legacy --spacing-vs-* names remain as deprecated aliases until the view rewrite cuts usages over (W04 removes them).
